member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData
member.summary: FlowControlData class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: domain name for flowcontrol data.
current flow index.
dff token name.
whether or not to use dff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Every object that inserted in to SHaredStorage must have parmeterless c'tor defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or Sets domain name for flowcontrol data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.CurrentFlowIndex
member.summary: Gets or Sets current flow index.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.DffTokenName
member.summary: Gets or Sets dff token name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.FlowControlData.UseDff
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether or not to use dff.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object used for constructing the flow loop configuration.

member.summary: FlowLoopStatus class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object used for constructing the flow loop status.

member.summary: Gets or sets list of flow item names.

member.summary: Gets or sets dictionary of port/bin pairs.

member.summary: structure which holds all information needed for init.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: structure which holds all information needed for init.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketCount
member.summary: CallbackWrapper class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: DUT index of socket.
unit count of socket.
clean count of socket.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketCount.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Every object that inserted in to SHaredStorage must have parmeterless c'tor defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketCount.DutIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets dut index for socket.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketCount.UnitCount
member.summary: Gets or sets unit count.

member.summary: Gets or sets clean count.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketDownData.DutID2SocketDown
member.summary: Gets or Sets Dictionary mapping DutId to whether the socket is down.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketDownData.TestOrderGroupCount
member.summary: Gets or Sets count for test order group.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.SocketDownData.HasAnySocketDown
member.summary: Returns if any socket down data exists.
member.returns: Value indicating whether any socket down data exists.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramServiceStorage
member.summary: PortBinInfo class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramServiceStorage.StoredSocketDownData
member.summary: Gets or sets socketDownData information.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramServiceStorage.IsDieIdPostExecuteEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramServiceStorage.BritaChecksumInstanceNames
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.summary: TraceFlowItem class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.IPrimeInitController
member.summary: Provides to control knobs for Prime Init for TT savings.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.IPrimeInitController.IsForceFullInit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether forcing full init without any optimizations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.IPrimeInitController.IsUserForceFullInit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user defined the forcing full init without any optimizations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.IPrimeInitController.IsForceReVerify
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether it should run ForceReVerify or not.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.ITestProgramService
member.summary: Provides the services related to the test program.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.Internal.ITestProgramService.GetPrimeInitController
member.summary: Get the Prime init controller object.
member.returns: Priem init controller.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService
member.summary: Provides the services related to the test program.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.ExecuteTestInstance(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the given test instance doing the proper handling of the of the test name (tname) for datalogging used by during that test instance's execution ().
member.param: The name of the test instance to execute.
The test name (tname) to use for datalogging during the test instance=[]'s execution. If it's empty, the service will use the value provided in .
The current/caller context session.
member.returns: The resulting port of the execution of the test instance=[].

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.SetBritaChecksumInstanceNames(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Sets the list of test instance for Brita's checksum.
member.param: The list of test instance for Brita's checksum.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetBritaChecksumInstanceNames
member.summary: Gets a previously populated list of test instance for Brita's checksum.
member.returns: The list of test instance for Brita's checksum.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsSingleDieSortTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "SDTSORT", "SDSORT" or "SDSSORT".
member.returns: True when is Single Die Sort test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsWaferSortTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "SSORT" or "SORT".
member.returns: True when is Wafer Sort test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsSortTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to any type of Sort Test.
member.returns: True when is either Single Die Sort or Wafer Sort test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsPackageTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to any type of Package Test.
member.returns: True when in Package Test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsFunctionalClassTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "CLASS".
member.returns: True when in Functional Class Test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsCombinedClassTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "CCLASS".
member.returns: True when in Combined Class test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsStructuralClassTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "SCLASS".
member.returns: True when in Structural Class test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsQaTestFlow
member.summary: Returns true if SCVars.SC_TEST_FLOW is set to "QA".
member.returns: True when in Quality Assurance test flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentTestInstanceParameter(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets current test instance parameter value.
member.param: Name of parameter to get.
Current instance's context session.
member.returns: String representation of parameter value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentTestInstanceParameters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all parameters for current test instance.
member.param: Current instance's context session.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for current test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetInstanceParameters(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all parameters of specific type and test instance required by user.
member.param: Name of the test instance to get parameters for.
Parameter type choosed to return parameters.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for chosen test instance and type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentInstanceParameters(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all parameters of specified type in current Instance.
member.param: Parameter type choosed to return parameters.
Current instance's context session.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for current parameter and chosen type.type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentInstancePlistParameters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all Plist parameters for current instance.
member.param: Current instance's context session.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all Plist parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for current test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentInstanceTimingConditionParameters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all Timing Condition parameters for current instance.
member.param: Current instance's context session.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all TimingC ondition parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for current test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentInstanceLevelsConditionParameters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all Levels Condition parameters for current instance.
member.param: Current instance's context session.
member.returns: Dictionary containing all Levels ondition parameters as string pairs [parameter name, parameter value] for current test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetLoopingStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Gets current loop execution status for specified flow item.
member.param: Name of the flow item (flow or test) to be checked upon.
member.returns: Returns current loop value and total loop value, use GetCurrentLoop and GetTotalLoop to get the information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.SetLoopConfig(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets current loop execution status for specified flow item.
member.param: Name of the flow item (flow or test) to be set.
Boolean that shows whether flow loop type is Count (true) or DurationInSeconds (false).
Maximum allowed loop value.
Expression to show what exit port range to break out of the loop.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetLoopConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Gets current loop execution configuration details for specified flow item.
member.param: Name of the flow item (flow or test) to be checked upon.
member.returns: Returns loop type, maximum loop value, and break range expression, use IsLoopTypeCount, GetMaxLoop and GetBreakExpression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetDefinedDutsIndex
member.summary: Gets a list of the defined DUTs index.
member.returns: A list of the defined DUTs index.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCurrentEepromSocketSerialNumber
member.summary: Gets the current EEPROM socket serial number.
member.returns: Current EEPROM socket serial number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.SetDomainCurrentFlow(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets Domain Flow current flow.
member.param: Name of the domain to be set.
Value to be set for the given domain name.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetDomainCurrentFlow(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets Domain Flow current flow.
member.param: Name of the domain to be set.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Return current flow index for given Domain.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.CreateFlowDomain(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create Flow Control Domain structure.
member.param: Name of the domain to be set.
Value of Domain Flow.
Name of DFF token.
User DFF token value as Source for Fork.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsDffEnableForDomainFlow(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get if DFF is enabled for a given domain Flow.
member.param: Name of the domain to be set.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if DFF override is enable.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetDffTokenNameForDomainFlow(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get DFF Token Name for a given domain flow.
member.param: Name of the domain to be set.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: DFF token Name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetFlowBins
member.summary: Gets the bin info of the current flow.
member.returns: List of strings that contain the bin info of the current flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetFlowStatuses(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the status info of current flow.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A map of flow item name and status of current flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetAllFlowTraceData
member.summary: Gets all flow trace items.
member.returns: List of flow trace items.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.SetFirstFailBin(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the first fail bin from binList and sets it.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetNamesOfAllTestTypeFlowItems
member.summary: Gets all instance name with flow type 'Flow'.
member.returns: List of strings that contain all instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetNamesOfAllTestTypeTestItems
member.summary: Gets all instance name with flow type 'Test'.
member.returns: List of strings that contain all instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetInstanceNamesAndPorts
member.summary: Gets all instance names and port.
member.returns: List of strings that contain instance names and port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.ConvertToTracePath(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Converts flow items paths to Trace-like paths.
member.param: List of string containing flow item with type 'flow'.
List of string containing flow item with type 'test'.
member.returns: List of strings that contain instance names.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IncrementUnitCountForSite(System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Increments by one the unit count fo the corresponding dutIndex.
member.param: Current dut index.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Total unit count for site incremented by one.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetUnitCountForSite(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the total count by summing up each individual counts for every DUT.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Unsigned integer indicating the accumulative unit count.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetUnitCountForEachSocket(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the total count by summing up each individual counts for every DUT/Socket.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Unsigned integer indicating the accumulative unit count per every socket ID.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetCleanCountForEachSocket(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all current clean count values for each dutIndex.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A map of dutIndex and clean count value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsPrimeInstance(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the given test class name is for a Prime test instance or not.
member.param: The name of the test class to check.
member.returns: If it's a Prime class name or not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.InitializeTestOrderGroupCount
member.summary: Initialize the SocketDown data for the current lot session.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.ResetTestOrderGroupCountForDut
member.summary: Resets struct containing socket down for the corresponding DUT by setting value to false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.UpdateTestOrderGroupCount
member.summary: Updates the test order group count and return its value.
member.returns: Integer indicating the test order group count number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.IsDieIdPostExecuteEnabled
member.summary: Gets if the post execute dieId port saving is enabled.
member.returns: True if DieId port saving post execute must be executed by test instance kernel.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetPortInfoForInstanceName(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets port information for the flow.
member.param: Instance name for the flow item.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Dictionary of flow item name with list of the ports for the flow item.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.GetBinForCurrentInstancePortNumber(System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the bin number for a given port of the current instance.
member.param: The port number from which to get the assigned bin.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The assigned bin number for the given instance port. Returns a default value of 0 if bin values have not yet been populated in memory or if the bin value was not found.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService.ResetSocketCount(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Resets the new table to store the socket count information per DUT.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopConfiguration
member.summary: Contains loop type, maximum loop value, and break range expression for specified flow item.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopConfiguration.IsLoopTypeCount
member.summary: Gets the flow loop execution type.
member.returns: Returns Count or DurationInSeconds.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopConfiguration.GetMaxLoop
member.summary: Gets the maximum allowed flow loop execution value.
member.returns: Returns maximum loop value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopConfiguration.GetBreakExpression
member.summary: Gets the early exit port range expression.
member.returns: Returns break range expression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopConfiguration.GetResolvedMaxLoopValue
member.summary: Gets the resolved max loop value from the flow loop item.
member.returns: The actual max value of the loop.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus
member.summary: Returns current loop value and total loop value for specified flow item.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus.GetCompletedLoopCount
member.summary: Gets the current loop execution value.
member.returns: Returns current loop value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus.GetCompletedTimeInSeconds
member.summary: Gets the current lapsed time of a loop Flow Item.
member.returns: Returns Time in Seconds.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus.GetTotalLoop
member.summary: Gets the total loop execution value.
member.returns: Returns total loop value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem
member.summary: Returns current loop value and total loop value for specified flow item.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetParent
member.summary: Gets Parent of flowItem.
member.returns: parent name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetFlowableName
member.summary: Gets flowable name of trace flow item.
member.returns: flowable name of trace flow item.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetFlowItemName
member.summary: Gets flow item name.
member.returns: Flow item name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetExitPort
member.summary: Gets exit port for trace flow item.
member.returns: exit port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetBinName
member.summary: Gets bin name for trace flow item.
member.returns: Bin Name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetCounters
member.summary: Gets list of counters for trace flow item.
member.returns: List of Counters.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetStatuses
member.summary: Get flow status for trace flow item.
member.returns: Status of flow either pass/fail.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.ITraceFlowItem.GetUserVars
member.summary: Get user variables for trace flow item.
member.returns: Status of flow either pass/fail.

member.name: T:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramService
member.summary: TestProgramService implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramService.GetAlephFilesRegEx
member.summary: Gets files RegEx.
member.returns: Always empty.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramService.GetAlephInitPriority
member.summary: Gets Aleph priority.
member.returns: Always medium.

member.name: M:Prime.TestProgramService.TestProgramService.AlephInit(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Aleph init.
member.param: Files.
